Estimated costs are based on typical usage in your postcode, with regular usage on weekday afternoons and evenings. Your
household’s usage may vary. Costs exclude controlled load charges, solar payments, concessions and bonuses.
A more personalised estimate can be found on the Victorian Energy Compare website at https://compare.energy.vic.gov.au.

When you choose to buy a GreenPower product from an energy retailer, the retailer then invests the additional charge in the
renewable energy industry. These purchases are audited by a group of government agencies.
